body.title: [in_progress] Worker instance identity surface: instance_name = abbrev.number; agent_id = self.instance_name
body.intention: I intend that DickSimnel addresses itself by its instance identity (instance_name='DS.0'), not its class id ('dicksimnel') — so agent_id in alarms/escalation names the instance.
body.description:
**Intention:** a worker addresses itself by instance, never by class id ('address instances, never classes'). This builds the identity SURFACE and rewires agent_id; the reusable-number leasing is downstream (gated on the shim front-door).

**What to build:** a thin `IdentityMixin` (composition, consistent with the capability-mixin model) carrying:
- `instance_abbreviation: str` — class attr (DickSimnel sets `"DS"`).
- `instance_number: int = 0` — DEFAULT 0 for now (0 = foreground/primary). The reusable free-list LEASE from the shim is a separate downstream ticket (T-shim-lease-instance-numbers, D-shim-frontdoor-on-groundloop) — do NOT build leasing here; just default to 0.
- `instance_name` property = `f"{self.instance_abbreviation}.{self.instance_number}"` -> `"DS.0"`.
Compose `IdentityMixin` onto `DickSimnelDevice` (alongside `CodingCapability`). Then change `_run_inference` (device.py) from `agent_id="dicksimnel"` to `agent_id=self.instance_name`.

**Do NOT build here:** number leasing / shim front-door (D-shim-frontdoor-on-groundloop), personality-in-prompt layer (no consumer yet), Agent(BaseDevice) subclass (stream B). Scope is the identity surface + the agent_id rewire only.

**Completion criteria:** a host mixing in `IdentityMixin(instance_abbreviation='DS')` has `instance_name == 'DS.0'`; `DickSimnelDevice._run_inference` calls `run_capability(ticket, agent_id='DS.0')` (i.e. `self.instance_name`), with NO literal `'dicksimnel'` agent_id left. Verify (grep) nothing downstream KEYS on the literal agent_id `'dicksimnel'` (escalation walk / system_alarm attribution read it as a label, not a routing key — confirm before shipping; if something matches on it, surface, don't silently break it).

**Test plan (real red->green):** (1) unit: host with IdentityMixin(abbrev='DS') -> instance_name=='DS.0'. (2) spy `CapabilityMixin.run_capability`, drive `DickSimnelDevice._run_inference`, assert called with `agent_id='DS.0'` (was 'dicksimnel'). Red before instance_name exists / agent_id is the literal; green after.

**Validation (runtime):** after ship, DS.0's escalation/alarm log lines carry `agent=DS.0`, not `agent=dicksimnel`. Observable via `~/.unseen_university/logs/dicksimnel/` INFO crossing lines showing `agent=DS.0`.

**Affected files:** NEW `unseen_university/identity/instance_mixin.py` (or `unseen_university/capabilities/identity.py` — builder's call, thin mixin); `unseen_university/devices/dicksimnel/device.py` (compose mixin + agent_id rewire). NEW `tests/test_worker_instance_identity.py`.

**Logging:** no new path; the existing capability->domain crossing INFO line now shows agent=DS.0 (the observable).

**Scope boundary:** identity surface + agent_id rewire on DickSimnel only. Number leasing, front-door, personality layer, and any other device are out of scope.
